docs.title: S.Rajaseekaran vs Union Of India And Ors. on 22 April, 2014
docs.headline: State Governments must make road safety an integral part of road design at the planning stage and conduct regular road safety audit of selected stretches ... termed as ‘black spots’ i.e. problem spots where a large number of accidents occur. Regular maintenance of all highways and roads both
docs.author: R Gogoi

docs.title: S.Rajaseekaran vs Union Of India And Ors. on 19 September, 2016
docs.headline: safety measures including identification and rectification of black spots. It has been mentioned that 789 black spots have been identified based on fatality data available ... identification of black spots on National Highways. In other words, an amount of Rs.1100 crore has been made available for the road safety purposes
